```{r setup, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
require(sf)
transit <- read.csv("transit_cost.csv")
```

```{r spatial autocorrelation,  out.height="35%", message = FALSE,  warning = FALSE}

medcost <- transit %>% group_by(country) %>% summarize(median.cost = median(cost_km_millions, na.rm=T))

colnames(medcost) <- c("ISO", "Median_Cost")

shp <- st_read("World_Countries_Generalized.shp")

medshp <- merge(shp, medcost)

well <- medshp %>% select(Median_Cost, geometry)

plot(well, main = "Median Cost of Transit Project per km (in millions of USD)")

```
